prompt: Show me the active accounts at Mountain Region and report each record's ID, name, and next review date. Do not change or notify anything yet. In the final recap, give the target ID first, original next review date second, and corrected next review date third.

follow_up_turns.content: For Juniper Home Care (ACC-7077) only, set the next review date to 2026-11-16. Leave the other listed records unchanged and do not notify anyone.
Correction: set ACC-7077's next review date to 2026-12-20, not 2026-11-16. Keep the same target and the same no-notification rule.

stages.purpose: List the requested filtered records so the later explicit ID remains tied to the correct entity.
Apply the first next review date only to the explicitly selected listed record.
Replace that next review date with the user's correction on the same listed record.

response_constraints: Use the filtered list to establish the available records; do not substitute a search call for the requested list.
Apply both next review date instructions only to the explicitly named target ID from the list.
Do not claim the list or either update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected next review date as current and identify the first requested next review date as superseded.
The final recap must present these items in order: target ID; original next review date; corrected next review date.
